docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAHONY, ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YANCEY, TODD $8,058.10 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,228.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-12-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANNE MAHONEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TODD YANCY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING TODAY'S MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,058.10 FILED BY MAHONY, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT YANCEY, TODD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED AUG-24-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YANCEY, TODD
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE PER THE REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF ANN MAHONY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TODD VANCEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHALLENEGE OF VENUE. COURT FINDS VENUE IS CORRECT. COURT DEEMED PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS VALID. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-14-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANN MAHONY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TODD YANCEY IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT PROOF OF SERVICE IN COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO BE FILED WITH THE COURT AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. CASE CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE. PLAINTIFF NOT REQUIRED TO REDO-SERVICE ON DEFENDANT TODD VANCEY. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2023 - JUDGMENT.
